title: Hovoto Draining Mat, Kitchen Super Absorbent Draining Mat, Super Absorbent Kitchen Counter Mat, Coffee Machine Mat,Quick Dry Dish Drainer Mat, Anti Slip Drainer Mat for Kitchen Counter, Gray, 30x50cm
features: 【Durable PU Material】Draining Mat, Made of special PU surface, the drying mat is durable and durable, and it hides coffee, milk and other dirt stains very well. Say goodbye to conventional colored dishwashing mats.

【Quick Absorbing】Dish Draining Mat, The surface is made of water-absorbing and quick-drying material, catch drips under a dish rack or place pots, pans, serveware and glassware directly on the mat, keep the countertop clean and tidy at all times

【Anti-slip Backing】The rubber bottom of the silicone draining mat has good non-slip and shock-absorbing effects, preventing water from leaking from the bottom. Place the coffee maker on the highly absorbent drying mat, and the non-slip bottom will stand stably on the table.

【Multifunctional Mats】The coffee maker mat protects the sink, cutlery and glass from scratches and is great for placing and drying dishes in the kitchen. Rubber mats can also be used as heat resistant mats, counter mats, pet feed mats and more.
【Easy Cleaning】The dish drying mat doesn't need to be cleaned more often because it hides stains well. Simply wipe by hand with dish soap to remove stains. The mat dries itself very quickly.
description: From the brand Hovoto Draining Mat The brand strives to create a warm, harmonious and loving family atmosphere through its products Previous page The core of Hovoto's brand concept is to "combine the warmth of home with the art of living". This concept runs through every detail of the brand, from product design to user experience to brand culture design, all reflecting the deep affection for home and the pursuit of a better life. dish drying mat spice rack wall storage shelf Next page
